improvement_bullets: Developed Power BI and Looker workflows, including building interactive dashboards, to replace manual written reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40%.

Created automated executive summary decks (PowerPoint slides) by translating complex findings into business recommendations for stakeholders, ensuring consistent data interpretation and faster strategic decisions.

Validated data by comparing exports across multiple sources and standardizing organizational KPIs and data governance frameworks to ensure a consistent 'single source of truth' and reduce report discrepancies.
Built Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports, demonstrating the ability to learn quickly and apply new automation techniques to streamline processes and save significant time.

Designed and executed A/B tests for digital marketing campaigns, showcasing critical thinking and problem-solving skills to measure audience response and provide statistical evidence for optimizing marketing spend.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Planning and Forecasting Intern opportunity with Phibro Animal Health. I am interested in this opportunity because Phibro Animal Health's commitment to being a trusted partner in animal health and nutrition aligns with my drive to leverage data for impactful solutions. What interests me about working for Phibro Animal Health is its dedication to fostering a diverse workforce where creativity and skills are openly shared; this environment of support and growth excites me because I am a motivated self-starter eager to learn and contribute. I believe my proficiency in Excel and my experience in data validation would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on detail and efficiency. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I developed Power BI and Looker workflows to replace manual written reporting, reducing data mismatches and improving work efficiency by 40%. This resulted in a significant improvement in reporting accuracy and faster strategic decisions, directly correlating to the need for creating Excel-based analysis files and validating data across sources. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my automation skills. I built Python automation for weekly sales and operations reports, eliminating repetitive data entry and saving 8 hours per week. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my data validation skills in working on building dashboards using existing PA Cubes at Phibro Animal Health. I know that my proficiency in Excel and my experience in data validation align with what it takes to succeed at the Planning and Forecasting Intern role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
